Wandelroute door het Steenwijkerwold, vl: Hiking route through the Steenwijkerwold, near Steenwijk. Here the flat Overijssel countryside changes into a rolling landscape with forests, ancient lanes, meadows, and a small raised bog pond.
Binnen 30 minuten fietsen van het centru: Within 30 minutes by bike from the center of Amsterdam, you will find yourself in the quintessential Dutch peat meadow landscape. Spot the black-tailed godwit, reed warbler, and hear the bluethroat sing.
Deze wandeling in de Weerribben gaat dwa: This walk in the Weerribben goes straight through the fields, pure nature. Tip: bring boots to keep your feet dry. The route is closed during the breeding season, from March 15 to July 15.
Wandel in het midden van de Slikken van: Walk through the middle of the Slikken van Flakkee along winding forest paths, surrounded by bird songs. Along the way, you pass a birdwatching hut that offers a beautiful view of the breeding bird islands and the lively birdlife.
In het midden van de Slikken van Flakkee: In the heart of the Slikken van Flakkee, walk along winding forest paths surrounded by bird songs. On the route, you will find two birdwatching huts from which you can enjoy a wonderful view of the breeding bird islands and the vibrant birdlife.
Walk through the middle of the Slikken van Flakkee along winding forest paths, surrounded by bird songs.
Maak een wandeling van 1,5 uur door de S: Take a 1.5-hour walk through the Slikken van Flakkee Zuid, accessible via the gate at the foot of the dike of the Gorsingenpad. Walk along reed fields and mudflats where you can encounter roe deer, skylarks, lapwings, hares, black-tailed godwits, and golden plovers.
Wandel in alle rust in het bosrijke natu: Enjoy a peaceful walk in the wooded nature area of Kabbelaarsbank. The winding paths take you through the forest and along the reeds to a viewpoint overlooking breeding bird islands in the Grevelingenmeer.

Enjoy a peaceful walk in the wooded Kabbelaarsbank nature reserve. The winding paths lead you through the forest and along reeds by the water. You will pass two viewpoints overlooking breeding bird islands in the Grevelingenmeer.
Bezoek de Grebbelinie en ontdek de stilt: Visit the Grebbelinie and discover the tranquility and abundant greenery during a walk along the ranger's trail in Utrecht. Keep an eye out for kingfishers and see cuckoo flowers in bloom.
Kom naar het kabouterpad in het Steendam: Come to the gnome trail in the Steendamsterbos, where no less than forty different gnome figures are situated. There is a lot to see along the way! Various types of trees and plants, as well as animals.
Door de modder, over slootjes en langs o: Through mud, over ditches, and past fallen trees, wander through the Achterbos in the Duivenvoordse and Veenzijdse Polder. Tip: wear boots.
Wandelroute door het relatief jonge, wat: Walking route through the relatively young, water-rich Diemerbos. Part of the route is very wet after rainfall due to the peaty soil, so if possible, wear waterproof shoes or boots.
Wandeling langs een beekdalrivier met ze: Walk along a brook valley river featuring rare bluegrass meadows and a wide variety of plant species.
Struin over ongeplaveid pad en wandel la: Stroll along an unpaved path and walk past marsh plants and the purple heron on this ranger's trail in the Rottige Meente. A challenging walk through an undiscovered natural area of Friesland.
Fietstocht in Rottige Meente over schelp: Bike ride in the Rottige Meente over shell paths through water-rich nature reserves with abundant reeds and characteristic drift holes with their ribs, swamps, and quaking bogs.
Korte wandeling langs moerasbos en petga: Short walk along swamp forest and peat holes in the Rottige Meente.
Wandeling over houten vlonders, dwars do: Walk over wooden boardwalks, through the marsh, and over fens and species-rich grasslands in De Deelen. An area formed by peat extraction for turf production.
Wandeling over de landtongen en tussen d: Walk along the peninsulas and between the peat holes of De Deelen, an area formed by peat extraction for turf production.
Wandelroute door de koninklijke bossen v: Walking route through the royal forests of the Oranjewoud estate, where nature, culture, and history come together.
Wandeling door een bos dat vanaf 1925 is: Walk through a forest planted from 1925 in Dwingelderveld, heading towards the Witteveen. Turf was once harvested here.
Deze wandeling gaat langs de telescoop v: This walk passes the Dwingeloo telescope and the Smitsveen. Along the way, enjoy beautiful views over the wide heathlands of Dwingelderveld.
Deze wandeling gaat via fraaie vennen na: This walk goes via beautiful fens to the Holtveen, where the raised bog in Dwingelderveld is given a chance once again.
Een wandeling door de 'Weerribben in het: A walk through the 'Weerribben in miniature', with panels along the path providing information about what you encounter on the way.
Deze kindvriendelijke educatieve route i: This child-friendly educational route is short and fun. Start: parking lot at the Dorpsboerderij Triade in Dronten. You can also get a drink here. Follow the white route.
Afwisselende wandelroute met aandacht vo: Varied walking route focusing on flora and fauna in the Swifterbos in Dronten. Educational information boards explain the wildlife in the forest. Start: parking lot Bosweg, Swifterbant, Dronten. Follow the yellow route.
Een korte wandelroute door een afwissele: A short walking route through a diverse urban forest in Dronten, over bridges and along ditches. Discover the village forests of Dronten with this walk through the Wisentbos.
Deze verharde wandelroute in het Wisentb: This paved walking route in the Wisentbos is suitable for wheelchairs. Start: parking lot on Wisentweg. Follow the purple route.
Wandeling door de Manteling van Walchere: Walk through the Manteling of Walcheren. Lanes, ponds, and rhododendrons reveal to the observant walker that this forest is part of an estate.
Wandeling door het krekengebied Rammeken: Walk through the creek area Rammekenshoek around Fort Rammekens on Walcheren.
Een slingerende tocht over water, langs: A winding journey over water, along creeks, reedlands, and through the old Veerse Bos with all its inhabitants. There's plenty to experience on the forest ranger's path in Veere!
Deze route loopt in de richting van het: This route leads towards the military training area in the Lauwersmeer region. Along the way, you will pass a bird hide, a reed purification area, and orchid fields.
Beleef de nacht en bekijk de sterren op: Experience the night and observe the stars at this truly dark location. But also during the day, it is a nice route to walk thanks to QR codes providing more information about the Dark Sky Park.
Wandelroute door het Diepsterbos in natu: Walking route through the Diepsterbos in the Lauwersmeer nature area. Tip: the route can be very muddy, so wear sturdy shoes or boots.
Leuke route door het Lauwersmeergebied v: Enjoyable route through the Lauwersmeer area suitable for the whole family.
Wandelroute in het Lauwersmeer waarbij j: Walking route in the Lauwersmeer where you will learn all about our solar system.
Wandel door het Ballastplaatbos in het L: Walk through the Ballastplaatbos in the Lauwersmeer area. Along the way, you pass a sand martin wall and enjoy the view from the observation tower.
Wandel rond de Reeuwijkse Plassen en gen: Walk around the Reeuwijkse Plassen and enjoy Dutch views over the water and the polders. Bring your binoculars; birds are visible well in all seasons!
Wandel langs het water en door de oer-Ho: Walk along the water and through the typically Dutch polders of the Reeuwijkse Hout. Dogs are welcome, but a modified route applies then.
Een gevarieerde wandeling over de kades: A varied walk over the dikes and grasslands of the Reeuwijk polders. Past the Oukoopse Mill and the nature farm Hoeve Stein.
Deze wandeling toont de Reeuwijkse Plass: This walk shows the Reeuwijkse Plassen in all their splendor. From endless views over the water to narrow farm roads through bird-rich polder land.
Tijdens de luisterroute 'Het verhaal van: During the audio route 'The Story of the Millingerwaard' you will discover all about the special nature of the area as you wander.
Wandeling door het Lheederzand in Dwinge: Walk through the Lheederzand in Dwingelderveld, a former drifting sand area planted with trees starting in 1907.
Het familiepad in het Dwingelderveld is: The family path in Dwingelderveld is well accessible for wheelchairs. This also applies to the picnic tables along the way.
Wandeling om het Witteveen en langs het: Walk around the Witteveen and along the Lheebroekerzand with its juniper shrubs and alongside the Witteveen in the Dwingelderveld.
Een wandeling langs vennetjes en het Koe: A walk alongside small pools and the Koelevaartsveen, a former peat area in Dwingelderveld, where raised bog is given a chance to recover.
Wandelroute De Acht van Amen leidt je do: The Acht van Amen walking route leads you through forests and meadows, in 2 loops each taking about forty-five minutes to an hour.
Waan je in de middeleeuwen, de tijd dat: Imagine the Middle Ages, the time when this cultural landscape was formed. A varied walking route along the Drentsche Aa by streams and hedgerows. This walk can be shortened to 7 km.
Een gevarieerde wandeling in de Drentsch: A varied walk in the Drentsche Aa through a forest with a rich history. You will pass a pinetum (conifer arboretum) among other sights.
Ontdek de slingerende beekjes en natte h: Discover the winding streams and wet meadows with special flower species during a walk along the ranger’s path by the Deurzerdiep in Assen.
Waan je in het Drenthe van eeuwen gelede: Experience the Drenthe of centuries ago during a walk along the ranger’s path in the Drentsche Aa. In August, the Ballooërveld is in full bloom. Climb the historic Gallows Hill and admire ancient cart tracks in the purple heather.
Deze mooie wandeling in de Drentsche Aa: This beautiful walk in the Drentsche Aa takes you through forest and along ponds.
Dit boswachterspad voert je door Nationa: This ranger’s path takes you through National Park Drentsche Aa over push moraines and heathlands, with dolmens, burial mounds, and ancient cart tracks. Along the way, you can discover many animals and plants.
Wandelroute Ballooërveld voert je door e: The Ballooërveld walking route takes you through one of the oldest and most characteristic heath landscapes of Drenthe. While walking, you will discover what makes this area so special.
Wandelroute door open velden en langs we: A walking route through open fields and along wide views. The sense of space in this Drentsche Aa walk provides a special nature experience.
Ontdek het Oudemolense Diep tijdens een: Discover the Oudemolense Diep during a walk along the winding stream in Drentsche Tynaarlo. Walk along heath, through forest, and admire the beautiful damselfly.
Een lange wandelroute in de Drentsche Aa: A long walking route in the Drentsche Aa along ancient cart tracks, burial mounds, and dolmens. The Schipborger Diep meanders through marsh marigold meadows where marsh marigolds, orchids, and blue vervain bloom.
Ruige wandeling door de woeste gebieden: A rugged walk through the wild areas of Vlieland. From the route, you have views over the Wadden Sea, with an oyster bed at low tide.
Deze wandeling leidt je langs de voormal: This walk leads you past the former duck decoy Oude Kooi on Vlieland. It is no longer used as a duck decoy but is partially restored and used as a ranger’s residence.
Wandeling door het Westerbos, het eerste: Walk through the Westerbos, the first pine forest of Vlieland. As the trees grew larger, the area came to be called Bomenland.
Op het boswachterspad op Vlieland ontdek: On the ranger’s path on Vlieland, discover the many birds of the Wadden Island. Hear the bluethroat, see the eider duck, and smell the blooming honeysuckle.
Een wandeling door het open duin en bos: A walk through the open dunes and forest of Vlieland, rich in cultural history and cranberry fields.
Deze wandeling door bos en duin begint m: This walk through forest and dunes begins with a steep climb. Along the way, enjoy a generous view over the Vlieland dunes and landscapes full of cultural history.
Misschien wel één van de allermooiste wa: Possibly one of the most beautiful walking routes through the Sint Anthonis Forestry, with plenty of variety.
Afwisselende route door boswachterij Sin: Varied route through the Sint Anthonis Forestry, partly crossing enclosed agricultural land. The route can be shortened to 3.5 km.
Deze route in boswachterij Sint Anthonis: This route in the Sint Anthonis Forestry passes through the wet areas of the Visdel and through forest and along heathland. The route can be shortened to 3.5 km.
In de boswachterij Sint Anthonis wandel: In the Sint Anthonis Forestry, you can walk through a different landscape approximately every 15 minutes. The route can be shortened to 4 km.
Wandel over het boswachterspad in Sint A: Walk along the forest ranger’s path in Sint Anthonis and discover a variety of landscapes. Look out for the nightjar, garden warbler, and see the blooming heath.
Wandeling in boswachterij Ruinen, over u: Walk in the Ruinen Forestry over vast heathlands and 'wild lands'.
Korte wandeling door boswachterij Ruinen: Short walk through the Ruinen Forestry over vast heathlands and 'wild lands'.
Wandeling langs het Echtenerzand, de Gij: Walk along the Echtenerzand, the Gijsselterkoelen, and the Bovenveen in the Ruinen Forestry.
Maak kennis met de uiterwaarden van de W: Get to know the floodplains of the Wageningse Bovenpolder. You might encounter the grazers who help keep this area open.
Het Wielproefpad in het Purmerbos voert: The Wielproefpad in the Purmerbos takes you through this young polder forest. This walking route only follows paved paths and is therefore suitable for strollers and people with physical disabilities.
Tijdens wandelroute Het Ommetje in het P: During the Het Ommetje walking route in the Purmerbos, you get the real ‘forest feeling’ and can enjoy the fresh outdoor air. Perfect for stretching your legs!
In het Purmerbos ligt het Phoenixpad. Ti: In the Purmerbos lies the Phoenixpad. During this visual poetry route, you walk past poems and visual art.
Kom samen met je hond een frisse neus ha: Come and get some fresh air together with your dog during this walk in the Purmerbos.
Wandeling over 8 ‘bergen’ en door bossen: Walk over 8 ‘hills’ and through forests in the Rijk van Nijmegen. With beautiful views over polders, picturesque lanes, and the river landscape.
Wandeling over de Duivelsberg in het Rij: Walk over the Duivelsberg in the Rijk van Nijmegen. You will pass fields, through deciduous forest, and alongside the Filosofenbeek stream.
Wandeling in Groesbeekse Bos in het Rijk: Walk in Groesbeekse Bos in the Rijk van Nijmegen, through rolling hills and along beautiful vistas.
Walk in Groesbeekse Bos in the Rijk van Nijmegen, through a 175-year-old beech forest.
Wandeling in Overasseltse en Hatertse Ve: Walk in Overasseltse and Hatertse Vennen in the Rijk van Nijmegen, along ponds, heathland, and the famous fever tree.
Wandeling in Groesbeekse Bos, door bos e: Walk in Groesbeekse Bos, through forest and along a hidden heath field. The elevation differences in this part of the Rijk van Nijmegen reach up to 45 meters.
Familiepad door het vennengebied bij Ove: Family trail through the pond area near Overasselt, without elevation changes, accessible for wheelchairs, walkers, and strollers.
Wandeling over de Duivelsberg in het Rij: Walk over the Duivelsberg in the Rijk van Nijmegen. You will walk along deciduous forests, meadows, and small fields.
Walk over the Duivelsberg in the Rijk van Nijmegen, along oak forest and meadow, up to very near the German border.
Wandeling in Groesbeekse Bos in het Rijk: Walk in Groesbeekse Bos in the Rijk van Nijmegen, through the forest and along a remarkable beech lane.
Wandeling langs vrijwel alle vennen in n: Walk along nearly all the ponds in the nature reserve Overasseltse and Hatertse Vennen, southwest of Nijmegen.
Een familiepad van 2 kilometer door het: A 2-kilometer family trail through the beautiful Duivelsberg area in the forests of Berg en Dal.
Wandeling door Horsterwold, waar de wiel: Walk through Horsterwold, where the oriole feels right at home. But you will also encounter the hawk and buzzard here.
Wandeling in Horsterwold, over een kasta: Walk in Horsterwold, over a chestnut lane where you can collect thousands of chestnuts in autumn.
Langs deze route in het Horsterwold groe: Along this route in Horsterwold, hundreds of different types of mushrooms grow in beautiful colors and shapes.
Wandelroute door het Horsterwold waar je: Walking route through Horsterwold where you encounter different types of nature. From expansive heath along the water to lush forest, from young planting to a forest section with fallen spruces.
Ontdek de Oeffelter Meent in Maasheggen,: Discover the Oeffelter Meent in Maasheggen, with its grasslands and river dunes. This 6.7 km walking route guides you past centuries-old plots, separated by the typical Maasheggen hedges.
Ontdek met deze wandeling Portaal de Vil: Discover Portaal de Vilt with this walk, the gateway to the nature areas Oeffeltsche and Beugense meadows and De Vilt. Featuring typical Maasheggen hedges and a thousands-of-years-old Maas river arm full of life.
De Sint Agatharoute is een laarzenpad va: The Sint Agatharoute is a 4.2 km boots trail starting at the oldest monastery in the Netherlands, Sint Agatha. It takes you through the Maasheggen, the oldest cultural landscape in the Netherlands.
Deze 2,5 km lange wandelroute door Maash: This 2.5 km walking route through Maasheggen winds through dunes and meadows lined with hawthorn hedges. The Pontipad can be muddy when wet, so wear boots!
Wandelroute door het gebied De Bergjes i: Walking route through the area De Bergjes in Maasheggen over old drifting sand dunes with oak trees, birches, poplars, and Scots pines.
Wandel over het boswachterspad door de M: Walk along the forest ranger's path through the Maashorst and admire the diversity of landscapes. Discover the old pioneer forest, the blooming heath fields, and walk across the short grasslands.
Smalle kronkelige bospaadjes op de helli: Narrow winding forest paths on the slopes of the old Maas steep edge with a beautiful view over the Maas valley in Central Limburg.
Wandelroute in Nationaal Park de Meinweg: Hiking route in National Park De Meinweg across heath and through forest. You can still clearly see the traces of the fire that occurred here in April 2020. Follow the markers with the black pictogram.
Langs de oevers van de Swalm in Midden-L: Along the banks of the Swalm in Central Limburg, this varied walking path goes through old forest, heathland, and grasslands.
In Nationaal Park De Meinweg in Midden-L: In National Park De Meinweg in Central Limburg, you can wander for hours without encountering anyone. This route passes through Scots pine forests that once supplied wood for the mines.
Wandeling door het westelijk deel van he: Walk through the western part of the Leudal in Central Limburg. You pass by the St. Elisabeth Monastery and the Kloosterhof with its beautiful old oak trees.
In De Meinweg in Midden-Limburg kun je u: In De Meinweg in Central Limburg, you can wander for hours without coming across anyone. This route goes over the drifting sand hills, planted with Scots pine in the early 20th century.
De Meinweg in Midden-LImburg is een para: De Meinweg in Central Limburg is a paradise for those seeking peace with endless walking opportunities. This route passes along the Melicker Ven and the Herkenboscher Ven.
Deze route in Midden-Limburg toont de gr: This route in Central Limburg shows the great variety of landscapes in National Park De Meinweg and also visits the Rolvennen.
Twee beken en een aantal cultuurhistoris: Two streams and several cultural-historical objects make the Leudal in Central Limburg a distinctive area where walking is a pleasure.
Deze route in Nationaal Park Meinweg in: This route in National Park Meinweg in Central Limburg passes the former St. Ludwig College with its imposing monastery, meadows, beautiful forests, and chapel.
Nationaal Park De Meinweg in Midden-Limb: National Park De Meinweg in Central Limburg is a true walking paradise. This route goes through forests and across heathlands along the Rolvennen.
Een wandeling door het Leudal in Midden-: A walk through the Leudal in Central Limburg along hollow ways to the Ursulamolen. Along the way you may encounter Scottish Highland cattle.
Een kort rondje door de heidevelden van: A short circular route through the heath fields of the Meinweg in Central Limburg, with old oaks and pine forests. Suitable for wheelchairs. Halfway there is a lookout tower. Dogs are allowed on a leash.
Wandelroute om lekker uit te waaien, doo: Walking route to enjoy a good breeze, through pine forest and alongside farmland in Central Limburg.
Spannend wandelpad in Midden-Limburg ove: Exciting walking path in Central Limburg along winding trails through the forest, to the edge of National Park De Meinweg and the lookout tower. Follow the wooden posts.
Wandeling door de Schadijkse bossen in N: Walk through the Schadijkse forests in North Limburg, where landscapes alternate and nature surprises you anew every season.
Deze wandelroute leidt door het deel van: This walking route takes you through the part of the Schadijkse Forests filled with ancient drifting sand dunes. Enjoy a beautiful view over Schaaks Heide.
Deze lange route slingert door heel het: This long route winds through the entire nature reserve. It passes both Schuitwaters, through varied forests, over heathlands and past poor grasslands.
Deze korte maar krachtige route neemt je: This short but intense route takes you through the immense richness of the Schuitwater. Kingfishers and beavers feel at home here.
Wandeling door de oude Maasbedding van h: Walk through the old Maas riverbed of the diverse Schuitwater area in North Limburg. Gnaw marks reveal the presence of beavers.
Rondje langs vennen waar het hele jaar d: A round trip along fens where there is something to observe all year round. From croaking moor frogs in spring and blooming ling heather in summer, to skating on the fen in winter.
Wandel over de statige, oude lanen van h: Walk along the stately, old lanes of the Beestenveld, past trees that change color with the seasons and bear names of rulers and saints.
Wandelroute door Beestenveld langs stati: Walking route through Beestenveld along stately tree lanes almost a century old. In the Koordekanaal, a canalized brook, you can find dragonflies, damselflies, moor frogs, and viviparous lizards.
Deze wandelroute voert je langs de kronk: This trail takes you along the winding Esperloop, which flows into the Snelle Loop. Tip: in autumn and winter wear boots or waterproof shoes, as it can be wet around the stream in places.
Beleef de geschiedenis van kamp Wyldemer: Experience the history of Kamp Wyldemerck. Scan the QR codes and listen to personal stories from former residents.
Een verrassend idyllisch landschap in Ga: A surprisingly idyllic landscape in Gaasterland, with extensive deciduous forests.
A surprisingly idyllic landscape in Gaasterland, with extensive deciduous forests and in some places a phenomenal view of the IJsselmeer.
Wandeling door het Oostvaardersveld in d: Walk through the Oostvaardersveld in the Oostvaarderplassen, with beautiful water areas full of birds.
De brede boslanen in het Hollandse Hout: The broad forest lanes in Hollandse Hout in the Oostvaarderplassen evoke an old estate. The cherries make this a paradise for the hawfinch. Dogs are allowed off-leash.
Geniet van een weids uitzicht en speur n: Enjoy a wide view and watch for the kingfisher during this walk in the Oostvaarderplassen in Flevoland. Boots are recommended in winter and wet weather.
Wandeling door het Kotterbos in de Oostv: Walk through the Kotterbos in the Oostvaardersplassen.
Wandeling in Hollandse Hout in de Oostva: Walk in Hollandse Hout in the Oostvaarderplassen, with dark beech forest, open meadows, maple and ash woods, and rustic ponds. There is a good chance you will see a roe deer, buzzard, or hawk.
Waan je midden in het duingebied tijdens: Imagine yourself in the middle of the dune area during a walk on the forest ranger path on Terschelling. Discover the songbirds, flower-rich dune valleys, and the vastness of Landerumheide and Waterplak.
Historische wandelroute door De Garst, o: Historical walking route through De Garst, in the Groningen moraine ridges, where the Battle of Heiligerlee took place in 1568.
Historische wandelroute door De Hoogte,: Historical walking route through De Hoogte, in the Groningen moraine ridges. Here the Battle of Heiligerlee took place in 1568. Follow the markers with the boots. Enjoy nature and learn about the history of this area.
Volg de wandelknooppunten 75, 69, 86, 26: Follow walking nodes 75, 69, 86, 26, 28, 69, and 75 for a round trip in Haagse Bos. An oasis of calm for those wanting to escape the busy city life for a while.
Midden in de stad Den Haag ligt het Haag: In the middle of The Hague city lies Haagse Bos. During a walk on this forest ranger path, you will find winding paths along large trees and forest floors full of spring-blooming stinzen plants.
Wandelroute door De Rhoonse Grienden in: Walking route through De Rhoonse Grienden in the IJsselmonde nature area. Here you find one of the Netherlands' last freshwater tidal willow coppices.
Wandeling door natuurgebied de Kempen De: Walk through the Kempen nature reserve. The route passes through extensive forest areas, the Cartierheide, and also the small-scale hamlet De Witrijt, which has existed since the Middle Ages.
Afwisselende wandeling die je langs dive: A varied walk that takes you along various types of coniferous and deciduous forest and across the Cartierheide in the Brabant Kempen.
In dit Kempense bos kan je hond lekker v: In this Kempen forest your dog can play and run freely. There is a play meadow with picnic sets.
Ontmoet de reeën en vele andere inwoners: Meet the roe deer and many other inhabitants of the Kempen nature reserve on this ranger’s trail in North Brabant. In summer, you walk past the gull colony.
Deze grenswandeling combineert de grasla: This border walk combines the meadows of the Goorloop stream valley with the extensive forest areas of the Brabant Kempen. You cross the Goorloop via several small footbridges and end in Witrijt.
Dit laarzenpad in de Brabantse Kempen ga: This 'boots path' in the Brabant Kempen literally crosses the Belgian border. The area mainly consists of extensive moist heathlands, interspersed with birch groves and the aromatic shrub species wild sweet gale.
Wandel over de zandige, voormalige landb: Walk over the sandy former agricultural lands, designated as nature since 2002, among the Hereford cattle and many birds. The route is easily passable; in extremely wet periods, boots are recommended.
Wandelroute door 't Roegwold en langs de: Walking route through 't Roegwold and along the Haansvaart. Along the way, you walk on the boardwalk through the reeds and trees and have a beautiful view over the Schildmeer.
Wandelroute Ae's Woudbloem Scald Ae voer: The hiking route Ae's Woudbloem Scald Ae leads you through a relatively young nature area with a rich history, forming a varied landscape of grasslands, scrub, pools, marsh, and drier sandy knolls.
Wandelroute langs de oude veenlopen Sloc: Walking route along the old peat waterways Slochter and Scharmer Ae in the Ae's Woudbloem area. The history of the landscape is palpable in this part of 't Roegwold!
Volg het wandelpad langs uitkijktoren “B: Follow the walking path along the lookout tower “Biesterwied” and enjoy, surrounded by many bird species, the view over the Schildmeer on one side and the vast, rough reed marsh of Groningen on the other.
Een houten pad door het moeras van ‘t Ro: A wooden path through the marsh of 't Roegwold. The view is different in every season, perfect for the best photos. Also fun for children!
Ontmoet Kobus de Kikker en zijn dierenvr: Meet Kobus the Frog and his animal friends and use the search card to look for water creatures yourself along the Oostervoortsche Diepje.
Wandel door een karakteristiek Drents es: Walk through a characteristic Drenthe esdorp landscape in the Zeijerwiek nature reserve. You pass hedgerows, small fens, es (arable fields), and wieken (watercourses).
Mensinge is Drenthe in een notendop. Je: Mensinge is Drenthe in a nutshell. Here you find all the elements of the classic Drenthe landscape gathered together.
Wandelroute langs het Esmeer, de grootst: Walking route along the Esmeer, the largest pingo ruin in Drenthe in the Kop van Drenthe. A pingo is a remnant of the last Ice Age in the Netherlands.
Dit boswachterspad voert langs alle typi: This ranger's trail passes all typical Drenthe landscapes such as heath, stream valley, and forest. But truly fascinating are the relics from a distant past that can be seen here.
Deze wandelroute brengt je langs typisch: This walking route takes you past typical Drenthe landscapes full of stories.
Wandel over het boswachterspad in het Ku: Walk the ranger’s trail in the Kuinderbos and discover 46 species of dragonflies, 500 plants, 80 breeding bird species, and the breeding raven. A journey along the natural riches of the Little Sweden of the Netherlands.
Een wandelroute in het Kuinderbos specia: A walking route in the Kuinderbos especially for dogs and their owners. Dogs may be off-leash here but must remain under voice control.
Wandeling door boswachterij De Vuursche: Walk through the De Vuursche forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug. Across estates, through dark pine forest and under sun-drenched deciduous trees.
Wandeling over landgoed Broekhuizen in b: Walk over the Broekhuizen estate in the Leersum forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug. Dogs are allowed on a leash.
Wandelroute door bos en langs heide in L: Trail through forest and along heathland in Lage Vuursche. An adventurous and varied route with small boardwalks to the Pluismeer en route.
Wandeling door boswachterij De Vuursche: Walk through the De Vuursche forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug, around Drakensteyn Castle and past burial mounds.
Wandeling door De Vuursche op de Utrecht: Walk through De Vuursche on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug over estates, through dark pine forest and under sun-drenched deciduous trees; through majestic beech forest and past a tollhouse.
Wandeling over landgoed Groeneveld op de: Walk over the Groeneveld estate on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug with its impressive groups of trees and ponds.
Laat je verrassen door het uitzicht vana: Be surprised by the view from the Elsterberg on the Amerongse Bos ranger’s trail in Utrecht. Hear the songbirds sing and smell the spring during the season.
Tijdens deze wandeling over het Leersums: During this walk over the Leersumse Veld on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug you encounter the famous Steen van Mariken. Dogs are allowed on a leash.
Wandeling over landgoed Groeneveld op de: Walk over the Groeneveld estate on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug connected to the current exhibitions at the castle.
Wandeling over landgoed Broekhuizen in b: Walk over the Broekhuizen estate in the Leersum forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug. This route is also suitable for people with limited mobility.
Wandeling door het Nonnenland in boswach: Walk through the Nonnenland in the De Vuursche forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug. Tip: wear boots. You walk here among cows across grassland that can be quite wet at times. Follow the black/white route.
Wandeling door de boswachterij Amerongen: Walk through the Amerongen forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug.
Wandeling door de bossen rond Amerongen: Walk through the forests around Amerongen on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug.
Wandeling door boswachterij Leersum op d: Walk through the Leersum forest reserve on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug.
Wandeling door De Vuursche op de Utrecht: Walk through De Vuursche on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug, over estates, through dark pine forest, along winding paths and stately beech avenues.
Beleef Ameland tijdens een wandeling ove: Experience Ameland on a walk along the ranger’s trail through the largest inland dune area of the Wadden Islands. Look out for eider ducks, the hen harrier, wheatears, and enjoy the wide view over the dune landscape.
Wandelroute Hagendoornveld voert je door: The Hagendoornveld trail leads you through dunes, past sea buckthorns—called ‘hagedoorns’ on Ameland. In late summer and autumn it is full of colorful berries here.
Een Amelandse wandeling met 2 gezichten;: An Ameland walk with two faces; the shelter of the Hollumerbos and along the sometimes wild Westerstrand.
Wandelen door de voormalige boomkwekerij: Walk through the former tree nursery on Ameland, with the oldest dune forests of the Wadden Islands. Here, the woodpecker feels at home.
Tijdens deze speurtocht leer je door mid: During this scavenger hunt, you will learn special facts about creepy-crawlies living in the forest of Nieuw Wulven through various assignments. Fun for children aged 8 to 14 years.
Loop deze cultuurhistorische route door: Walk this cultural-historical route through the Abbert and discover the history of this varied forest.
This route runs entirely through the forest. Along the way, you may encounter sheep as you walk alongside the fence where the sheep flock is herded.
Treed bij Schoonloo in het spoor van de: Follow in the footsteps of the wolf near Schoonloo on the Wolvenspoor, an adventurous route through the Heart of Drenthe.
Dit familiepad gaat langs het voormalige: This family trail passes by the former Westerbork camp, the Hingsteveen, and the radio observatory. This walk through the Heart of Drenthe is accessible with wheelchairs and walkers.
Volg het kronkelspoor van de Drentse bos: Follow the winding trail of the Drenthe forest ant, the sprokkel, and discover the wild side of the Heart of Drenthe. The route can be shortened to 7 kilometers by starting from the Zandspeelplaats parking lot.
Wandelroute over het Heuvingerzand in Ha: Walking route across the Heuvingerzand in the Heart of Drenthe.
Wandel over het boswachterspad in Noord-: Walk the forester's path in North Brabant and discover the wide views and endless silence of the Groote Heide and the Leenderbos. A walk past waterfowl and aromatic coniferous trees.
Wandelroute door de Pony-ren, een begraz: Walking route through the Pony Run, a grazing area for Icelandic ponies. The enclosed area consists of forest, heathland, drifting sand, and former agricultural lands.
Geniet tijdens deze wandeling van naald-: Enjoy coniferous and deciduous forest, a small pond, and the national monument De Directiekeet in the Leenderbos during this walk. This is where, in the 1930s, workers were paid.
Een wandeling door verschillende typen n: A walk through various types of coniferous forest, such as Douglas fir, larch, and Scots pine. Offering plenty of variety: old, young, open, and closed areas.
Wandel door naaldbos en langs heidegebie: Walk through coniferous forest and along the heathland area of Galberg in the Leenderbos. Here you can smell the delightful scents of conifers like Douglas fir and Scots pine.
Je hond mag los op deze route. Wandel la: Your dog is allowed off-leash on this route. Walk past heathland, drifting sand dunes, fields, and play meadows in the Leenderbos. A beautiful route for having a picnic along the way.
Waterrijke wandeling door het beekdal va: A water-rich walk through the Tongelreep stream valley and past historic fish ponds in the Leenderbos. This is the habitat of the kingfisher.
Wandel in Leenderstrijp terug in de tijd: Walk back in time in Leenderstrijp, past typical Brabant long-gabled farms, fields, heath, and forest in the Leenderbos nature area.
Wandelroute voor de fervente wandelaar d: A walking route for avid walkers through the Abtswoudse Forest in Midden-Delfland. Discover the Land art 'Mother Earth', walk along creeks, marshes, and through the forest.
Een klein rondje door het Abtswoudse Bos: A small circular walk through the Abtswoudse Forest in Midden-Delfland. Bring the children and enjoy a round walk through the polder and the forest.
Wandelroute door het Abtswoudse Bos in M: Walking route through the Abtswoudse Forest in Midden-Delfland. In the heart of the forest lies the Land art project ‘Mother Earth’, a hill formation shaped like a female body.
Walking route through the Abtswoudse Forest in Midden-Delfland. This area is known for its tranquility so close to the city and is home to the pine marten, kingfisher, and fox.
Wandelroute voor kinderen in boswachteri: A walking route for children in the Austerlitz forest district. The assignments, suitable for children from 6 years old, take you back in time to the era of Napoleon Bonaparte.
Wandelroute Buurderduinen op Ameland voe: The Buurderduinen walking route on Ameland takes you through three completely different landscapes, over high dunes, the beach, and elongated valleys.
Wandelroute ‘t Oerd brengt je ver van de: The 't Oerd walking route takes you far from inhabited areas into the tidal zone of Ameland. During extremely high water, the route is impassable, and in wet periods, suitable footwear is recommended.
Het paddenpad op Ameland is een leuke ro: The toad trail on Ameland is a fun route for little ones, featuring nature facts, an exciting path over the water, and a climbing tower.
Wandeling over Landgoed Soelen in de Bet: Walk through Landgoed Soelen in the Betuwe. The estate is characterized by a mix of forest and arable fields. Midway through the route, you will pass Castle Soelen.
Deze Familieroute in Waterrijk-West bren: This family route in Waterrijk-West takes you along swaying reed beds and the edge of the Rijkerswoerdse Lakes. Here, you can encounter many different bird species.
Deze wandeling gaat rond het strandpark: This walk goes around the beach park at Landgoed Loenen in the Betuwe.
Het laarzenpad gaat langs de Sluikse en: The boot trail passes by the Sluikse and Tuilse Kooi in the Betuwe. It also goes past the mill, the old ferry street, and the tow canal.
Deze wandeling gaat over het meer dan 10: This walk leads you through the over 1000-year-old estate Heerlijkheid Loenen in the Betuwe.
Ontdek het jonge Bentwoud en haar inwone: Discover the young Bentwoud and its inhabitants. In the open areas, hares can run away right in front of you from their forms.
Wandelroute door het Bentwoud, over (hal: Walking route through the Bentwoud, along (semi) paved paths through forests of various ages. The route also takes you past the medieval Hildam.
De vele heuvels en dalen rond Surae, Don: The many hills and valleys around Surae, Dongense Heining, and Seterse Bergen in Baronie van Breda are remnants of old sand drifts.
Deze wandeling leidt over de Strijbeekse: This walk leads over the Strijbeekse Heath in Baronie van Breda. Through pine forest, past heath, ponds, and Scots pines.
Speciale wandelroute voor hondenliefhebb: Special walking route for dog lovers in the Mastbos in Baronie van Breda. With the added feature of a dog pool. Follow blue signs with a dog's head.
Historische wandelroute door het Mastbos: Historical walking route through the Mastbos near Breda via stately avenues and ‘Maurits' square’.
Treed in de voetsporen van de smokkelaar: Follow in the footsteps of smugglers during a walk over the Strijbeekse Heath. Walk past Scots pines, heath, and discover the magical island.
Ontdek het Ulvenhoutse Bos in Baronie va: Discover the Ulvenhoutse Bos in Baronie van Breda via the family path, a paved path accessible for, among others, walkers with rollators, mobility scooters, and strollers.
Het Liesbos in Baronie van Breda is het: The Liesbos in Baronie van Breda is the largest old summer oak forest in our country. In spring, the forest floor is covered with pure white wood anemones.
Wandelroute Steenblik Boswachter Dorst i: The Steenblik walking route in Forest Officer Dorst in Baronie van Breda takes you past clay pits where clay was once dug for brickworks in Dorst and Rijen.
Wandeling door het Vechtdal waarbij het: A walk through the Vechtdal where the typical landscape is the focus.
Ooit was hier in het Vechtdal stuifzand,: Once drifting sand was here in the Vechtdal; now a varied forest is developing in the Ommen forest district, benefiting many plants and animals.
Wandeling door boswachterij Hardenberg i: Walk through the Hardenberg forestry area in the Vecht Valley, passing alternating forests of deciduous and coniferous trees and the Haarplas lake located in the middle of the forest.
Wandeling door de boswachterij Hardenber: Walk through the Hardenberg forestry area in the Vecht Valley.
Wandeling in boswachterij Ommen in het V: Walk in the Ommen forestry area in the Vecht Valley. Through forest and along meadows with scattered pollarded beeches. A solitary juniper bush recalls the heath that once existed here.
Deze wandeling in boswachterij Ommen in: This walk in the Ommen forestry area in the Vecht Valley goes through an estate forest, over the 32-meter-high Besthmenerberg hill, and along the Besthmenerven heathland.
Wandelroute door natuurgebied Polder de: Walking route through the nature area Polder de Dijken - Bakkerom in the Westerkwartier. This area is designed as a nature and water retention area. You walk on a semi-paved walking path, past a peat lake and towards the observation tower.
Wandeling door het oudste bos van het We: Walk through the oldest forest of the Westerkwartier, the Haarsterbos. Dogs are allowed but must be on a leash.
Volg het familiepad, een wandelpad zonde: Follow the family path, a walking trail without obstacles through the Trimunt area in Westerkwartier, suitable for walkers, wheelchairs, and strollers. One of the picnic benches along the route is accessible for wheelchairs.
Wandeling door het bos van Trimunt, met: Walk through the forest of Trimunt, featuring a monastery and the former route of the Drachten - Groningen tram line. Dogs are allowed but must be on a leash.
Wandeling langs de laatste heidevelden v: Walk along the last heathlands of the Westerkwartier. Connects with the Jilt Dijksheide route. In the off-leash area (pay attention to the signs!), dogs may run free.
Wandeling over Melle's Pad in Westerkwar: Walk along Melle's Path in Westerkwartier. Wander past an apple orchard and grassland, with a large floral carpet in spring. Tip: wear boots!
Wandelroute om de Kleine Noordwaard in d: Walking route around the Kleine Noordwaard in the Biesbosch. You walk over dikes, bike paths, and alongside roads. Don't forget to bring your binoculars. This is one of the best places to see a sea eagle.
Wandelroute waar alle facetten van de Bi: Walking route where all facets of the Biesbosch come together. The distance is 6 kilometers with the option to shorten it.
Wandelroute aan de rand van de stad Dord: Walking route on the edge of the city of Dordrecht. Featuring open spaces that offer opportunities for various plants and trees. On the winding paths, you may be lucky to spot a roe deer or fox.
Deze afwisselende wandeling neemt je mee: This varied walk takes you through old and new parts of the Biesbosch. You walk a 4-kilometer route through a watery area and willow forest with undergrowth.
Tijdens dit 'heen-en-weertje' loop je la: During this out-and-back walk, you pass along the Maltha polder in the Biesbosch. Formerly agricultural land, now a unique wetland area. The polder attracts many water and marsh birds that can be admired from the bird watching hut.
Tijdens dit 'heen-en-weertje' loop je ov: During this out-and-back walk, you walk over the dike through the Maltha polder in the Biesbosch. Formerly agricultural land, now a unique wetland area. The polder attracts many water and marsh birds that can be admired from the dike.
Deze afwisselende wandeling neemt je mee: This varied walk takes you through and along the new parts of the Biesbosch, a true bird paradise. Highly recommended!
Wandeling door een vrijwel onbewoond stu: Walk through a nearly uninhabited part of the Biesbosch, accessible only by boat. Where there are now watery reed polders, there used to be farms and grazing livestock in polders.
Dynamische Biesboschnatuur en cultuurhis: Dynamic Biesbosch nature and cultural history go hand in hand on this walking route. You take a journey back in time to the period when willow coppice workers ruled the Biesbosch.
Verbindingsroute door natuurgebied Moerp: Connecting route through the Moerputten nature area, from the Kruiskamp residential area in Den Bosch to the Gement nature area.
Korte wandeling door het Vresselsbos lan: Short walk through the Vresselsbos along the 'De Oude Putten' pond complex and through varied forests.
Wandeling langs de mooiste plekjes van h: Walk along the most beautiful spots of the Vresselsbos, where you may encounter Scottish Highland cattle in the summer months.
Afwisselende wandelroute door het Dommel: Varied walking route through the Dommeldal.
Maak een wandeling door het Vresselsbos: Take a walk through the Vresselsbos while your dog can run freely.
Een wandeling over de brede bosdreven va: A walk along the wide forest drives of De Geelders in the Groene Woud.
Laarzenpad door het eeuwenoude cultuurla: Boot path through the centuries-old cultural landscape of Wijboschbroek in the Groene Woud nature reserve.
Wandeling over de Moerputtenbrug en door: Walk over the Moerputten Bridge and through the Moerputten nature reserve, south of Den Bosch.
Wandelroute over struinpaden en langs mo: Walking route along trails and beautiful viewpoints in the Balij. The route can also be started at De Balije Tuin in Nootdorp.
Wandeling door het Bieslandse bos en de: Walk through the Bieslandse forest and the Bieslandse polder. This green oasis near the city takes you past various lookout points and the marshy creek area where you can spot many bird species. So take your binoculars with you!
Wandelroute door het Bieslandse bos. De: Walking route through the Bieslandse forest. The Krekenroute is worth walking in every season, but wear boots or waterproof shoes in rainy weather.
Wandelroute in de Balij door het jonge F: Walking route in the Balij through the young Floriade forest. Fancy a cup of coffee or tea? That is possible at city farm the Balijhoeve.
Op je wandeling in Halsters Laag, in Bra: On your walk in Halsters Laag, in Brabantse Wal, it may well be that a small herd of curious cows keeps you company here.
Wandel door het Moretusbos, op de Braban: Walk through the Moretusbos, on the Brabantse Wal, an ancient estate where culture and nature go hand in hand.
Een wandeling door het half open landsch: A walk through the semi-open landscape of Kortenhoeff on the Brabantse Wal, with heath and ponds where Dutch land goats graze.
Wandeling over heide en langs vennen in: Walk over heath and alongside ponds in Kortenhoeff on the Brabantse Wal.
Een route door de dennenbossen en heide: A route through the pine forests and heath of Kortenhoeff on the Brabantse Wal.
Wandel over het boswachterspad op de Bra: Walk over the forest ranger's trail on the Brabantse Wal and discover the many butterfly species, water birds, and watery views that the nature reserve offers.
Deze korte wandeling brengt je naar de r: This short walk takes you to the edge of the Deurnsche Peel. An extensive peat area with heath, marsh, and groves of birch and willow. Tip: wear boots or waterproof shoes in autumn and winter as it can be locally wet.
Ontdek Natuurpoort De Peel en wandel het: Discover Nature Gate De Peel and walk the Mussenkeetpad, through the rough Leegveld. New marsh nature was developed here in 2022. Tip: wear boots or waterproof shoes in autumn and winter as it can be locally wet.
Afwisselende wandeling, die zowel de Deu: Varied walk that includes both the Deurnsche Peel and the monumental village of Griendtsveen, which still breathes the era of peat mining around 1900.
Wandelroute aan de zuidkant van De Groot: Hiking trail on the southern side of De Groote Peel through a varied landscape of forest, heathland, and wide views over the raised bog marsh.
Wandeling langs vogelrijke vennen en gol: Walk along bird-rich pools and rolling heath fields. The area is grazed by goats and cattle. Start: Parking lot at the biological station Mariapeel, Koolweg 36a, Helenaveen. Follow the green route.
Wandeling door mooie naald- en loofbosse: Walk through beautiful coniferous and deciduous forests and open areas. Start: Parking lot at the biological station Mariapeel, Koolweg 36a, Helenaveen. Follow the yellow route.
Ontdek het boswachterspad in de Groote P: Discover the forest ranger's path in De Groote Peel and walk along wide views, the mirror moth, and other natural beauties in the National Park in Limburg.
Dankzij de knuppelbruggetjes houd je dro: Thanks to the plank bridges, you stay dry during this walk through De Groote Peel. Start: Visitor center De Pelen, Moostdijk 15, Ospel. Follow the red route.
Wandeling langs vogelrijke vennen en gol: Walk along bird-rich pools and rolling heath fields. The area is grazed by goats and cattle. Start: Parking lot at the biological station Mariapeel, Koolweg 36a, Helenaveen. Follow the red route.
Wandeling aan de rand van het hoogveenmo: Walk along the edge of the raised bog marsh in Deurnsche Peel, full of cultural history. Enjoy beautiful views over the bog marsh, alternated with heath, birches, and tussocks of purple moor-grass.
Korte wandeling in Nationaal park de Gro: Short walk in National Park De Groote Peel to the Belfort observation tower. From the top of the tower, which is no less than 22 meters high, you have a beautiful view over this area with a rich history.
Wandelroute door het Dieverzand aan de r: Walking route through the Dieverzand at the edge of Diever. A varied route through a former drifting sand area, where many different species of flora and fauna can now be found.
Deze wandelroute in Drents-Friese Wold g: This walking route in Drents-Friese Wold alternates between forest and open field. Dogs are allowed off-leash on part of the route.
Gevarieerde vogelrijke wandelroute door: Varied bird-rich walking route through Drents-Friese Wold, with hills and valleys. Dogs are allowed off-leash here.
Een gevarieerde wandeling in het Drents-: A varied walk in Drents-Friese Wold that goes through young forest and along the Lange Poel.
Wandeling in het Drents-Friese Wold lang: Walk in Drents-Friese Wold along hedgerows, grasslands, and fields. Dogs are allowed off-leash on part of the route.
Afwisselende wandeling in het Drents-Fri: Varied walk in Drents-Friese Wold where dark coniferous forest alternates with open meadows and small fields with heath.
Wandelroute door Berkenheuvel in het Dre: Walking route through Berkenheuvel in Drents-Friese Wold.
Wandelroute in het Drents-Friese Wold do: Walking route in Drents-Friese Wold through reclamation forest from the 1930s. Varied and peaceful route, with many narrow winding paths in the first part. The route also passes an observation screen with seating.
Een korte variant van de Olde Smildeger: A short variant of the Olde Smildeger walk in Drents-Friese Wold through a forest full of variety with heath and drifting sand.
Een wandeling in het Drents-Friese Wold: A walk in Drents-Friese Wold that leads past a hunebed (dolmen) and a still intact es (old cultivated field).
Wandeling door naaldbos in het Drents-Fr: Walk through coniferous forest in Drents-Friese Wold where much wildlife lives. At dusk, you have a good chance of seeing roe deer along the forest edge. Dogs are allowed off-leash here.
Wandelroute in het Drents-Friese Wold la: Walking route in Drents-Friese Wold along Apemeer, over heath, and through coniferous forest.
Een prachtige wandeling door het oude bo: A beautiful walk through the ancient tree forest of Vierhouten on the Veluwe. Twisting beeches and centuries-old oaks dominate the landscape here.
Afwissende wandeling in boswachterij Nun: Varied walk in the Nunspeet forestry area on the Veluwe, through deciduous and coniferous forest. Tip: your dog may be off-leash on part of the route.
Wandeling over het oude landgoed Varrena: Walk over the old Varrena estate on the Veluwe.
Deze bosbeleefroute op de Veluwe is een: This forest experience route on the Veluwe is a 3.6 km long path that leads along varied forests with Douglas fir, beech, and larch. Dogs are allowed on a leash.
Een wandelroute langs de mooiste plekken: A walking route along the most beautiful spots of the Boersberg on the Veluwe. The route passes the castle of Doorwerth and the observation tower on the Boersberg.
Walk through Stroeërzand on the Veluwe.
Wandelroute in boswachterij Kootwijk op: Walking route in the Kootwijk forestry area on the Veluwe.
Wandeling langs het Kootwijkerveen op de: Walk along the Kootwijkerveen on the Veluwe: a special fen and raised bog area, north of Kootwijk.
Wandeling door boswachterij Kootwijk op: Walk through the Kootwijk forest district on the Veluwe.
Wandeling langs Hoog Buurlo, Radio Kootw: Walk past Hoog Buurlo, Radio Kootwijk, and across the Hoog Buurlose Heath on the Veluwe.
Wandeling door het Speulderbos op de Vel: Walk through the Speulderbos on the Veluwe, with its oaks and beeches grown in wonderful curves. Tip: your dog may be off-leash on parts of the route.
Wandeling in Speulderbos op de Veluwe. T: Walk in Speulderbos on the Veluwe. Tip: your dog may be off-leash on part of the route.
Natte neuzenroute door boswacherij Ugche: Natte Neuzen route through the Ugchelen-Hoenderloo forestry area on the Veluwe. Dogs may be off-leash here.
Wandeling rond Hoog Buurlo op de Veluwe,: Walk around Hoog Buurlo on the Veluwe, passing the sheepfold among other sights.
Gevarieerde wandeling door de bossen en: Varied walk through the forests and heath of Schenkenshul on the Veluwe. The route passes several holiday parks where you can get lunch or a cup of coffee.
Walk through Spelderholt on the Veluwe. You will pass wildlife viewing screens Ringakker and 't Heitje.
Wandeling over het oude landgoed Varenna: Walk over the old Varenna estate on the Veluwe.
Wandelroute midden in het bosrijke gebie: Walking route in the middle of the wooded area near Harskamp. A semi-paved forest path, making it possible to enjoy this route in a wheelchair or with a stroller.
Een wandeling over heide en door bos in: A walk over heath and through forest in the 't Leesten nature area on the Veluwe.
Deze verharde route door boswachterij Nu: This paved route through the Nunspeet forestry area on the Veluwe is very suitable for wheelchairs and walkers. Follow the asphalt path.
Wandeling in het Drents-Friese Wold door: Walk through the Drents-Friese Wold via the reclamation forest and along the heath area of the Schoapedobbe.
Korte wandelroute door jong bos in het D: Short walking route through young forest in the Drents-Friese Wold, past a fen and a splash pond where dogs may swim off-leash. Dogs are allowed off-leash on a large part of the route.
Een route met 10 leuke doedingen door he: A route with 10 fun activities through the Drents-Friese Wold. Tip: very enjoyable for children!
Deze wandelroute leidt door heidebos en: This walking route leads through heath forest and dry heath of the Drents-Friese Wold. Attention: not accessible for dogs from March 1 to September 1. This is indicated on the signs.
Een wandeling door het stuifzandgebied i: A walk through the drifting sand area in the Drents-Friese Wold where heath sheep graze. Not suitable for strollers and prams.
Wandel over het boswachterspad in het Dr: Walk along the forest ranger's path in the Drents-Friese Wold and enjoy the silence of nature. In August, walk across the blooming heath fields.
In het Drents-Friese Wold vind je alle s: In the Drents-Friese Wold you will find all types of nature: forest, heath, drifting sand, and also some beautiful fens. Attention: not accessible for dogs from March 1 to September 1 (see signs).
Een kort ommetje vanaf het Buitencentrum: A short stroll from the Visitor Center in the Drents-Friese Wold. This walking route is suitable for wheelchair users, deaf and visually impaired people.
Deze wandelroute in Drents-Friese Wold l: This walking route in Drents-Friese Wold goes around the recreational lake, through young forests with many tree species. On part of the route, dogs may be off-leash.
Wandeling door boswachterij Kootwijk op: Walk through forest ranger area Kootwijk on the Veluwe. From the lookout tower you have a beautiful view over Kootwijkerzand.
Deze wandelroute voert door het bos en l: This walking route passes through forest and along extensive heath fields, a landscape where nature and history meet in a special way and where the past is still tangible.
Wandeling door de oude stuifduinen van b: Walk through the old drifting dunes of forest ranger area Kootwijk on the Veluwe.
Wandeling voor wie van flink doorstappen: Walk for those who like to stride along through almost the entire forest ranger area Nunspeet on the Veluwe. Follow the green route.
Deze struinroute over de Veluwe leidt ov: This rambling route over the Veluwe leads over heath, through forest, past burial mounds and trees that twist themselves into the most impossible shapes.
Wandeling in boswachterij Nunspeet op de: Walk in forest ranger area Nunspeet on the Veluwe. You walk through a hilly drifting sand forest, the Hendrikszand.
Een mooie wandelroute van 3,4 km door he: A beautiful walking route of 3.4 km through the forest area Buunderkamp on the Veluwe. Look around carefully, as you might encounter wildlife.
Korte wandeling met onderweg prachtig ui: Short walk with beautiful views en route of the former Radio Kootwijk transmitter station.
Wandeling door Speulderbos op de Veluwe,: Walk through Speulderbos on the Veluwe, passing burial mounds and the Boeschoten sheepfold.
Op het boswachterspad door de bossen van: On the forest ranger path through the Kootwijk woods, you discover drift sand, ancient oak forests, and junipers of the Veluwe. A long, varied walk along heathland, birds, and water.
Fraaie wandeling door het Vierhouterbos: Beautiful walk through the Vierhouterbos on the Veluwe, featuring ancient oak clumps and pine forests.
Een fraaie wandelroute op de Veluwe. Je: A beautiful walking route on the Veluwe. You walk through the former heathlands of Boeschoten, rich in cultural-historical heritage, located southwest of Garderen.
Route voor blinden en slechtzienden met: Route for blind and visually impaired people with stories about the Hoog Buurlo sheepfold on the Veluwe. Listen to stories on your smartphone using QR codes.
Deze verharde route bij Infocentrum 't L: This paved route near the 't Leesten Information Centre on the Veluwe is very suitable for wheelchairs and walkers.
Boswachterpad ’t Leesten op de Veluwe is: Forest ranger path 't Leesten on the Veluwe is a varied route through forest and heath. Anyone walking through this nature area now would not immediately suspect that it was actually an ancient industrial area.
Afwisselende korte wandeling door de bos: Varied short walk through the forests of the Veluwe.
Ontdek het Gagelbos bij Utrecht met een: Discover the Gagelbos near Utrecht with a colorful nature scavenger hunt. During this 'challenge walk' you learn all about the history of the New Dutch Waterline. Fun for children aged 4 to 12.
Wandelroute door het veelzijdige IJssels: Walking route through the versatile IJsselstein forest. This varied walk takes you through young and older forest, open landscape, water, a food forest in development, and past the remains of a duck decoy.
Walking route through the Needse Achterveld. A varied natural area with narrow walking paths. The route can also be shortened to 2.8 kilometers.
Wandeling over Landgoed Slangenburg, lan: Walk over the Slangenburg estate, past the Passmann family cemetery, the last private owners of the estate.
Wandeling langs één van de oude pachtboe: Walk past one of the old tenant farms in the Ruurlo forest district in the Achterhoek.
Wandeling over Landgoed Slangenburg, doo: Walk over the Slangenburg estate, through the monumental laneway system from the 17th century, shaped like a trapezium.
Wandelroute door het Stelkampsveld in de: Walking route through the Stelkampsveld in the Achterhoek. The yellow-marked 7-kilometer route takes you to the most beautiful spots.
Wandeling over het 17e-eeuwse lanenstels: Walk along the 17th-century laneway system of the Slangenburg estate in the Achterhoek.
Wandelroute door het Sterrenbos van het: Walking route through the Sterrenbos of the 17th-century Slangenburg estate, passing old large oaks and big hornbeams.
Deze wandeling over Landgoed Slangenburg: This walk over the Slangenburg estate passes, among other things, the paardenkolk and the four symmetrically laid out ponds along the driveway.
Ontdek het Achterhoekse kampenlandschap: Discover the Achterhoek camp landscape during a walk on the forest ranger's trail in Ruurlo. In spring, the forest is painted in various shades of green.
Dit natuurpad slingert tussen met water: This nature trail winds among water-filled clay pits that were created by excavating clay for the brick factory in Groenlo in the Achterhoek.
Wandeling langs het Boelekeerlspad in de: Walk along the Boelekeerl path in the Achterhoek.
Wandeling door de bloemrijke weilanden t: Walk through the flowery meadows between the Lievelderbeek and the Nieuwe beek in the Achterhoek.
Wandeling door een oud cultuurlandschap: Walk through an ancient cultural landscape in the Achterhoek, with marsh marigolds in spring and grasslands full of orchids in summer.
Wandeling langs één van de mooiste lanen: Walk along one of the most beautiful avenues in the Ruurlo forest ranger’s district in the Achterhoek.
Dit pad gaat voor een groot deel door ee: This path mostly goes through a spruce forest in the City Forests of Lelystad. The winding trails ignite the imagination. Start this route at the end of the access road through Gelderse Hout at the Oostervaart or at the bike path along Oostranddreef and Gelderse Diep.
Deze route loopt door bos en grasland, l: This route runs through forest and grassland, along reed shores and water with beautiful views in the City Forests of Lelystad. There are 3 starting points: parking at Veldweg entrance; parking at Zuigerplasdreef entrance; and parking at Karveel entrance on Bosweg.
Het is wat het is: een rondje om de plas: It is what it is: a round trip around the pond in the City Forests of Lelystad, also suitable for people with physical disabilities.
Deze route leidt je door de prachtige bo: This route takes you through the beautiful forests next to the Kemphaan in the City Forests of Almere. You might even spot a kingfisher!
Wandel over het boswachterspad in Almere: Walk the forest ranger's trail in Almere and discover the 7 forest artworks of the Museum Forest. Climb the highest hill of the Flevopolder, pick berries in the elderberry orchard, and get lost in the labyrinth.
Wandelroute Rondje Aap gaat over Stadsla: The Rondje Aap walking route goes through City Estate De Kemphaan in the City Forests of Almere and leads you past the monkey sanctuary of Stichting Aap.
Deze route brengt je door de bossen rond: This route takes you through the forests around the Kemphaan and along a beautiful section of the Hoge Vaart in the City Forests of Almere.
Wandelroute langs de mooiste plekjes in: Walking route along the most beautiful spots in the Emmerdennen; one of the oldest, multifunctional forests in Southeast Drenthe.
Wandeling langs sporen uit het verleden: Walk along traces from the past in the Sleenerzand.
Wandeling door boswachterij Sleenerzand: Walk through the Sleenerzand forest district in Southeast Drenthe.
Wandeling door het Sleenerzand in Zuidoo: Walk through the Sleenerzand in Southeast Drenthe. Dogs are allowed on a leash.
Walk through the Sleenerzand in Southeast Drenthe. Dogs may run off-leash on this route.
Wandelroute langs hunebedden en andere s: Walking route past dolmens and other traces from the past in Valtherbos in Southeast Drenthe.
Wandeling door het Valtherbos in Zuidoos: Walk through the Valtherbos in Southeast Drenthe.
Deze wandelroute in Salland gaat door bo: This walking route in Salland goes through forest and over the Holterheide. Along the way, you pass the Holterberg viewpoint, one of the most beautiful spots on the Sallandse Heuvelrug.
Wandel dwars door open duin en over het: Walk straight through open dunes and over the beach of Hollands Duin. Beautiful viewpoints along the way. Dogs are allowed on a leash from March 15 to August 15.
Wandelroute door de duinen van Hollands: Walking route through the dunes of Hollands Duin south of Katwijk. Alternating between open dunes and old farmland. Dogs are allowed on a leash from March 15 to August 15.
Wandel over het boswachterspad in Hollan: Walk over the forest ranger's path in Hollands Duin near Katwijk. Spot the wild swan and fieldfare in winter, or enjoy year-round the beautiful view from the Vlaggenduin.
Wandeling dwars door het open duinlandsc: Walk straight through the open dune landscape of Hollands Duin. Tip: combine this with a beach walk.
Wandeling langs stuivende duinen en door: Walk along shifting dunes and through wet dune valleys in Hollands Duin. Dogs are allowed on a leash from March 15 to August 15.
Ontdek het lied van de nachtegaal tijden: Discover the song of the nightingale during a walk over the forest ranger's path in Hollands Duin near Noordwijk. In spring, you see blooming bulb fields; in summer, visit the parnassia here.
Wandeling door de naaldbossen van Ganzen: Walk through the coniferous forests of Ganzenhoek in Hollands Duin, with a view over the bird pond. Tip: bring your binoculars! Dogs are allowed on a leash from March 15 to August 15.
Wandeling door het open duingebied van H: Walk through the open dune area of Hollands Duin, but also through a patch of pine forest, along beautiful views.
Wandel langs uitzichtpunt Vlaggeduin, he: Walk past the Vlaggeduin viewpoint, the highest point of Hollands Duin. On clear days, you can see the sea. Dogs are allowed on a leash from March 15 to August 15.
Wandeling door het dennenbos in boswacht: Walk through the pine forest in the Noordwijk forest district, Hollands Duin. Some people call this the squirrel walk. And rightly so!
Deze afwisselende route loopt zowel door: This varied route goes through both pine forest and the open dune area of Hollands Duin.
Afwisselende wandeling door zowel dennen: Varied walk through both pine forest and the open dune area of Hollands Duin.
De Vledderroute leidt je langs een lapje: The Vledderroute leads you past a patchwork of young forests and peat colonies in the Kanaalstreek. With beautiful lanes, winding paths, and a large pond.
Deze route laat je natuurgebied Pan in e: This route shows you the Pan nature reserve in a nutshell. From heathlands with a herd of Kempen heath sheep and various (crust) mosses to old coniferous forest. Tip: wear boots or waterproof shoes in autumn and winter.
Deze wandeling brengt je langs de mooist: This walk takes you along the most beautiful and characteristic parts of Pan with a beautiful view of the Sterkselsche Aa and Sterkselsch canal. Tip: wear boots or waterproof shoes in autumn and winter.
Wandeling door het Bronnenbos in het Rog: Walk through the Bronnenbos in the Roggebotzand, with special native trees and shrubs.
Deze route door Roggebotzand loopt voor: This route through Roggebotzand runs mostly along the water. You can find many insects and dragonflies here.
Deze afwisselende route door Roggebotzan: This varied route through Roggebotzand leads you through different types of forest with several viewpoints overlooking, among other things, the Ketelmeer.
Deze wandelroute door Roggebotzand is ge: This walking route through Roggebotzand is named after the Canadian city because of the trees planted in 1958, which were donated by the Ontario Horticultural Organization.
Route door Emmerdennen op de Hondsrug, é: Route through Emmerdennen on the Hondsrug, one of the oldest forest areas in Drenthe.
Wandeling door Boswachterij Westerschouw: Walk through Boswachterij Westerschouwen and the grazing area on Schouwen-Duiveland.
Wandeling door boswachterij Westerschouw: Walk through Boswachterij Westerschouwen on Schouwen-Duiveland, featuring wind-shaped forest and a fire lookout tower with views.
Walk through Boswachterij Westerschouwen on Schouwen-Duiveland, passing through a moist, richly vegetated valley.
Wandelroute over verhard pad door Boswac: Hiking route along a paved path through Boswachterij Westerschouwen at the tip of Schouwen with plenty of picnic spots along the way.
Wandel langs oude dennen, reeën en omrin: Walk past old pines, roe deer, and surround yourself with dozens of birds on the forest ranger’s path in Schouwen-Duiveland. Do you hear the woodpecker’s drumming?
Ga in Schouwen-Duiveland op ontdekkingst: Go on an exploration in Schouwen-Duiveland’s largest forest. Climb the dunes, visit the fallow deer, or look for the wheatear in the Meeuwenduinen.
Deze wandelroute is de mooiste doorsteek: This walking route is the most beautiful shortcut from Schoorl to Bergen. Walk through the varied forest and experience the elevation changes. The route is an out-and-back.
Ommetje door de Schoorlse Duinen en het: Loop through the Schoorlse Duinen and the center of Schoorl. Start at: Buitencentrum Schoorlse Duinen, Oorsprongweg 1, Schoorl. Follow the yellow route.
Wandeling door de Schoorlse duinen. Deze: Walk through the Schoorl dunes. This route goes over the highest dune ridge in the dune area. From the visitor center, follow the red route.
Wandelroute door de Schoorlse duinen. De: Walking route through the Schoorlse dunes. This Tree Planters’ Tour passes through the oldest forests in the dune area. From the visitor center, follow the green route.
Deze wandeling in Salland gaat voor een: This walk in Salland mostly goes through forest but also along some small-scale heathlands.
Wandelroute op de Sallandse Heuvelrug. D: Walking route on the Sallandse Heuvelrug. This route leads you over the 19th-century estate De Eelerberg, featuring majestic beeches and ancient oaks.
Wandelroute voor kinderen en (groot)oude: Walking route for children and (grand)parents with a fun route including challenging play objects and playground equipment. Purchase the assignment booklet at the visitor center.
Deze wandelroute over de Sallandse Heuve: This walking route on the Sallandse Heuvelrug goes over heath and through forest. Along the way you pass centuries-old oak trees and junipers.
Wandeling over de heide van de Sallandse: Walk over the heath of the Sallandse Heuvelrug and along the highest point in the area, the Grote Koningsbelt.
Wandeling over de Sallandse Heuvelrug, d: Walk over the Sallandse Heuvelrug, through forest and heath, past a sheepfold, small-scale agricultural fields, and the former Twilhaar labor camp.
Walking route over the Sallandse Heuvelrug. During the Rietslenk Walk you go through forest, over heath, through valleys, and can enjoy viewpoints.
Deze wandeling gaat onder andere langs h: This walk passes, among other places, the Noetselerberg viewpoint. In good weather, you can see far away, sometimes even into Germany.
Deze afwisselende wandelroute gaat door: This varied walking route goes through forest and heath. Along the way you will find information panels about the geology of the Sallandse Heuvelrug.
Wandelroute de kleine natuurroute biedt: The Little Nature Route offers a varied walk through the Krimpenerhout. Good boots are recommended on wet days.
De wandelroute Energiebos biedt qua natu: The Energy Forest walking route provides one of the most diverse natural and landscape experiences in the Groene Hart - Krimpenerwaard.
Go on a discovery tour through the Loetbos. Climb over the water using the play equipment and discover the fairy tale characters in the forest.
De wandelroute Natuurroute doet vrijwel: The Nature Route walking trail passes through nearly the entire Krimpenerhout, including the energy forest where nature and high-voltage pylons alternate.
In het natuurlijke Loetbos is een ‘eetba: In the natural Loetbos, an 'edible' route is marked. Depending on the season, you can enjoy authentic Dutch fruits such as apples, pears, and plums here.
Deze wandeling brengt je langs de mooist: This walk takes you past the most beautiful and characteristic parts of Sang and Goorkens, including the flowery grasslands, alder swamp forest, reed beds, pollard willows, and fields.
Boswachterspad Beek en Bos op de Hondsru: The Beek and Forest ranger’s path on the Hondsrug is like walking through a painting. Enjoy the view at Hemelriek, the Anderse Diep, and former sand drifts.
Besloten naald- en loofbos, open heide e: Enclosed coniferous and deciduous forest, open heath, and drifting sands alternate in the Exloo forestry on the Hondsrug.
Stel je voor hoe het landschap op de Hon: Imagine how the landscape on the Hondsrug looked around 60 years ago: endless heath fields, some scattered trees, and many small fens.
Wandeling langs de mooiste plekjes van d: Walking route along the most beautiful spots of the Odoorner Pines on the Hondsrug.
Al wandelend door de boswachterij Gieten: While walking through the Gieten-Borger forestry on the Hondsrug, you can see and identify many impressive trees. Tip: route description available at the starting point.
Wandelroute door bosgebied op de Hondsru: Walking route through a forest area on the Hondsrug that was planted in the 1930s. Along the way, you pass burial mounds, dolmens, and beech avenues.
Wandeling door boswachterij Odoorn op de: Walk through the Odoorn forestry on the Hondsrug.
Wandelroute door het oeroude landschap v: Walking route through the ancient landscape of the Buinerveld, where the Drentse Aa springs. Featuring beautiful forest, extensive heathland, and idyllic fens.
Wandeling door boswachterij Gieten-Borge: Walk through the Gieten-Borger forestry on the Hondsrug, exploring the forest and its diverse functions. Tip: a brochure is available at the starting point.
Ontdek tijdens deze wandelroute de schil: Discover the picturesque skies and inhabitants of the Strabrechtse Heide during this walking route.
Wandel over de grootste aaneengesloten h: Walk across the largest contiguous heathland in Brabant, the Strabrechtse Heide. Half of the walk goes through the off-leash dog area, which is why this route is also called the Sniffle Route.
De Strabrechtse Heide is beslist een van: The Strabrechtse Heide is certainly one of the most impressive nature areas in the country, with endless fields of dwarf shrubs and common heather.
Wandeling over Strabrechtse Heide, langs: Walk across the Strabrechtse Heide, passing the sheepfold, insect garden, and vegetable garden. The shepherd and sheep can regularly be seen here.
Dit laarzenpad is een niet alledaagse ro: This boots path is an unusual route through the brook valley of the Rul Strabrechtse Heide, featuring wet grasslands and hay meadows. Follow the white markers with black boots.
Deze afwisselende route over de Strabrec: This varied route across the Strabrechtse Heide takes you past small-scale heath fields, heathland, and the drifting sand area De Galgenberg.
Boswachterspad door het dorp Orvelte, da: Ranger's trail through the village of Orvelte, which is a model of the Drenthe esdorp around 1900. The walk through the surroundings also shows the landscape from that time.
Rondje Dorpzicht op Texel voert je langs: The Dorpzicht loop on Texel leads you along the Roggesloot, an old Wadden Creek consisting of flowery, nutrient-poor grasslands. Here you are treated to orchids and many meadow and water birds.
De wandelroute De Hoorn van Texel is een: The De Hoorn van Texel walking route is a salty journey over old flood hooks: traces of former coastlines. Via a dune crossing you reach the wide beach in the direction of marker 9. Inland lies the bunker on Loodsmansduin. Sand flats attached to the coast, and through dune formation, Kuuldernollen (campground) and Neeltjesnol were formed, with views over Mokbaai and De Hors.
De Westerduinroute is een ronde via de d: The Westerduinroute is a loop via the dune edge and the wide beach. The shell path winds through rolling dunes and valleys with dune roses and a seagull colony. When climbing Kampeersnol, you enjoy a panoramic view over the Westerduinen.
Wandelroute Hoge Nol voert je langs de z: The Hoge Nol walking route leads you along the sea dyke and around the dune hill that gives the route its name.
Tijdens een wandeling over het Paggapad: During a walk over the Paggapad, you follow the trail of Kees ‘Pagga’ Gorter, the last island resident of a turf hut.
Wandelroute rondom De Krim op Texel met: Walking route around De Krim on Texel with two faces: one half goes through young forest with beautiful views of the bulb fields. The southern part leads along the edges of the golf course, with views over marshy grassland and dune hollows.
De wandelroute Hoornderslag loopt van De: The Hoornderslag walking route runs from Den Hoorn to the beach at marker 9. Via winding shell paths you cross the dunes with shrub heath and can visit the lookout point Loodsmansduin, with a beautiful panoramic view.
Rondje Maartenhuis voert je over het ter: The Maartenhuis loop takes you over the grounds of the residential and work community for people with care needs. You walk through a butterfly garden, along the bank of the dune stream Het Alloo, and through the Pelikaanbos.
De route wandelroute Neeltjesnol voert z: The Neeltjesnol walking route leads southwards to the dune hill with a view of the bird-rich mudflats of Mokbaai. Cross colorful polders and the dune edge, visit the hut of Lap, and enjoy the view at the bunker on Loodsmansduin.
Op de wandelroute De Dennen duik je de l: On the De Dennen walking route, you dive into the shelter of the greenery. Between tall trunks, the path winds upward to the lookout tower on the Fonteinsnol.
Dit ommetje op Texel is een langgerekte: This loop on Texel is an elongated circle. With some luck, you see a seal’s head sticking above the water or you observe numerous water birds resting and foraging in the dune lakes.
Wandelroute De Seeting is een rondwandel: The De Seeting walking route is a circular walk over the Zeereeppad, the Kogerstrand, through the Seetingsnollen, and past the highest point of Texel: the Seetingsnol (24.8 m).
De Eierlandse Duinentocht voert je door: The Eierlandse Duinentocht takes you through beautiful, irregular Texel dune grasslands towards the sea. Along the way, you spot characteristic flora and fauna typical of nutrient-poor dunes.
Het Geheim is een verrassend en afwissel: Het Geheim is a surprising and varied short walk. You walk via a path over the heath to the playful Knobbelpad along the forest edge.
Natuurpad De Mient voert door een verand: The De Mient nature trail passes through a changing landscape. Put on your walking shoes for a lovely trip over wooded dune ridges, heath, and moist low areas.
De Vuurtorenroute loopt door de Eierland: The Vuurtorenroute runs through the Eierlandse Duinen and over a broad beach to the lighthouse on Texel.
De Robbengatroute is een lange wandeling: The Robbengatroute is a long walk where you experience the very varied landscape of the northernmost part of Texel.
