De Muy- en Slufterbollenroute verbindt h: The Muy and Slufterbollen route connects the forest of De Koog with the Slufter in the north. You walk over a unique stretch of beach and through the Texel dune area managed by Staatsbosbeheer, with high dune peaks and freshwater creeks.
Natuurpad Alloo voert door duin, bos en: The Alloo Nature Trail passes through dunes, forest, and especially along the banks of the dune stream Het Alloo on Texel.
Wandeling rond het Pieter Rozenvlak. Spe: Walk around the Pieter Rozenvlak. Look out for hares and rabbits in this valley with heathland in the Texel Dunes.
Natuurpad door het bos De Dennen op de v: Nature trail through De Dennen forest on the former Westermient in the Texel Dunes.
Wandeling door De Muy en langs de Bertus: Walk through De Muy and along the Bertusnol, one of the highest dunes on Texel. Watch for hares and rabbits, and view the lighthouse across De Slufter.
Wandeling door Het Geheim in De Dennen,: Walk through Het Geheim in De Dennen, a diverse forest in the Texel Dunes that was still an open heath and dune area at the end of the 19th century.
Wandeling door de Bollekamer in de Texel: Walk through the Bollekamer in the Texel Dunes, an extensive ancient dune landscape with a fair amount of heath.
Wandelroute door Texelse Duinen, rond de: Walking route through the Texel Dunes, around the vast plain of Bleekers Vallei with its crooked hawthorns.
Wandeling in Texelse Duinen: rond De Plo: Walk in the Texel Dunes: around De Ploegelanden and Bleekerij, an open area in De Dennen forest, along a birdwatching screen and dune ridges.
Een wandelroute over slingerende bospaad: A walking route over winding forest paths along the most beautiful spots of the Wieringerrand in the Wieringermeer.
A walking route over winding forest paths along the most beautiful places of the Dijkgatsweide in the Wieringermeer.
A walking route over winding forest paths along the most beautiful places in the Wieringermeer.
A walking route over winding forest paths along the most beautiful spots in the Dijkgatbos in the Wieringermeer.
A walking route over winding forest paths along the most beautiful spots in the Sluitgatbos in the Wieringermeer.
Een wandelroute door het Dijkgatbos en d: A walking route through the Dijkgatbos and the Dijkgatsweide in the Wieringermeer and along the unpaved IJsselmeer dike with views over the polder and the IJsselmeer.
Zoek de kabouters en vind zo de juiste w: Look for the gnomes and find your way through the Dijkgatbos in the Wieringermeer. Fun for the whole family!
Wandelroute door het Robbenoordbos, door: Walking route through the Robbenoordbos, through forest and along polder waterways in the Wieringermeer.
Geniet van de bijzondere omgeving in het: Enjoy the special surroundings in the Dutch part of the South Limburg Three-Country Point and experience the view. Halfway through the walk there is a hospitality venue. Follow the red markers (route SBB 38).
Deze wandeling loopt door het Elzetterbo: This walk goes through the Elzetterbos, a quiet part of the Vijlenerbos. Very suitable for enjoying the wooded surroundings and views in South Limburg in complete silence and peace. Follow the red markers (route SBB 32).
Een familiewandeling door het Malensbos: A family walk through the Malensbos in South Limburg. Suitable for strollers, walkers, and electric wheelchairs. The route can be shortened to 2.2 kilometers. Follow the purple markers (route SBB 36).
Een route met veel variatie waarbij je l: A route with much variety where you walk along the beautiful Spijkvijver pond in Flevoland. There is a recreational beach here.
Wandel met rollator of rolstoel over ver: Walk with a walker or wheelchair on paved paths through the heart of Elswout, passing the orangery, coach houses, and the grand house.
Wandelroute van 4 kilometer over Buitenp: A 4-kilometer walking route through the country estate Elswout in South Kennemerland, through an ancient landscape designed according to the English landscape style.
Wandelroute van 2,5 kilometer over Buite: A 2.5-kilometer walking route over the country estate Elswout in South Kennemerland, where the orangery, moss slopes, and small bridges alternate.
Een wandeling door het gevarieerde lands: A walk through the varied landscape of the Bergerbos. This purple route starts at the Zevenboomsven or ’t Quin.
In deze wandeling kom je langs één van d: In this walk you pass one of the highlights of the Bergerbos: the lookout tower on the Hooge Heide.
De wandelroute door het Bergerbos voert: The walking route through the Bergerbos runs over the rolling river dunes, alternating through coniferous and deciduous forest, and along tranquil fens such as the Zevenboomsven and the Esven.
Maak een wandeling door het Bergerbos te: Take a walk through the Bergerbos while your dog can run freely off-leash.
De wandelroute door het Bergerbos gaat o: The walking route through the Bergerbos goes over the former estate Bleijenbeek. Along the way you may see black woodpeckers, badgers, and roe deer in the forests. On the heath of the Duvelskuul you can find various bees, viviparous lizards, and wood larks.
Wandel door het gevarieerde landschap va: Walk through the varied landscape of the Bergerbos. The route winds along the Zevenboomsven, over the rolling heath fields, and past the mirror-like fens of ’t Quin.
Maak kennis met de kleine stekelige egel: Get to know the small prickly hedgehog in the Sellinger forest. There you will find a special walking route: the Hedgehog Path. During this route, the hedgehogs show you the way.
Wandelroute door een van de oudste bosse: Walking route through one of the oldest forests in Groningen in Westerwolde. Under the trees grow wood anemones, lily of the valley, and Solomon's seal. Dogs are allowed on leash.
Informatieve route over de Westeresch bi: Informative route about the Westeresch near Veele. The artwork and the information boards, which also serve as an insect hotel, tell the story of the ash tree and the nature-inclusive agricultural project ESsentie. Follow the posts with the QR code.
Ontdek de kleine ijsvogel in het voorjaa: Discover the small kingfisher in spring and see the rare stone bramble in bloom during a walk on the forest ranger path in Ter Apel.
Wandeling door de bossen rond het kloost: Walk through the forests around the Ter Apel monastery in Westerwolde. The route is named after the former residents of the monastery: the canons. Dogs are allowed on leash.
Wandelroute van 7 kilometer door het afw: A 7-kilometer walking route through the varied landscape of ash trees and stream valleys in Westerwolde. Dogs are allowed on leash.
Beklim op boswachterspad Ter Wupping de: Climb the lookout tower on the forest ranger path Ter Wupping and look out over the Mussel Aa stream valley and the old ash trees. Due to the elevation changes, you forget that you are in Groningen.
Laarzenwandeling in een uniek stukje pol: Boot walk in a unique piece of polder where you can read the history in the strip field landscape.
De Siberiëroute door het Haaksbergerveen: The Siberia route through the Haaksbergerveen in Twente is a varied route over sand ridges with heath, and across dams and boardwalks through the raised bog. The characteristic peat moss is clearly visible here.
De heideroute door Twente voert langs wa: The heath route through Twente passes along water pools, over the sandy hill or ‘haar’ with beautiful heath vegetation, and past the raised bog core. The lookout point De Pluus offers a beautiful view over the extensive raised bog.
Op de Bronnenroute ontdek je de idyllisc: On the Bronnenroute, you discover the idyllic side of the Springendal in Twente: winding paths, boardwalks, and beech avenues along babbling streams, clear spring ponds, fields, and meadows.
Deze gevarieerde wandelroute door Twente: This varied hiking route through Twente passes through forest, along fields, burial mounds, and the urn field at Uelserdijk, where juniper bushes stand proudly above the heath.
De Leidijkroute loopt door de zuidpunt v: The Leidijkroute runs through the southern tip of the Engbertsdijksvenen in Twente, along peat pits and waterways. Along this route is also the birdwatching hide called 't Krik-eantie.
De Armenveenroute is een korte wandeling: The Armenveenroute is a short walk through the Haaksbergerveen in Twente, alternating between peat forest and dams through the raised bog with views of many peat lakes.
Ontdek met de IVN Natuurroute de natuurp: Discover the natural gems of the Haaksbergerveen in Twente with the IVN Nature Route. Spot dragonflies, hobby falcons, and adders, or you might hear the golden oriole with its typical “dudeljo.”
Freek van ’n Ekkelpad is een klein ommet: Freek van ’n Ekkelpad is a small detour through the northern tip of the Engbertsdijksvenen in Twente, with views over the Friese Koelen, a beautiful pond with many waterfowl.
De Streujenroute is een korte route door: The Streujenroute is a short route through the southern tip of the Engbertsdijksvenen in Twente. The route passes through peat forest, heathland, and along peat pits with snake's head, a typical marsh plant. The area can be very wet.
De Heideroute leidt langs een prachtig h: The Heideroute leads along a beautiful heathland, the Paardenslenkte, in the Springendal. This heathland is a remnant of the 'onland' that once covered large parts of Twente.
De Dinkelroute door het Lutterzand is ee: The Dinkelroute through the Lutterzand is a beautiful short route along the steep banks of the Dinkel river in Twente, the domain of the kingfisher and the yellow wagtail.
De Stuifzandroute door het Lutterzand vo: The Stuifzandroute through the Lutterzand follows the naturally meandering course of the Dinkel. Along the Stuifzandroute is a designated off-leash area for dogs.
Beleef Twente tijdens een wandeling over: Experience Twente during a walk along the forest ranger’s path in the Springendal. Walk through heathlands, along streams, and spot sand lizards and the stag beetle.
